---
title: "Enrolment Overview"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
#| #| echo: false
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(janitor)
library(patchwork)
library(countrycode)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(sf)

df <- read_excel("WOAH Datathon registration form(1-282).xlsx") |>
  clean_names()
```

## Registrations over time

```{r}
#| label: fig-timeseries
#| fig-cap: "Daily and cumulative registrations"
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6
#| echo: false
daily <- df |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(completion_time)) |>
  count(date) |>
  mutate(cumulative = cumsum(n))

p1 <- ggplot(daily, aes(x = date, y = n)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "2 days", date_labels = "%b %d") +
  labs(title = "Daily Registrations – WOAH Datathon", x = NULL, y = "Daily registrations") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

p2 <- ggplot(daily, aes(x = date, y = cumulative)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkorange", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "darkorange", size = 2) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "2 days", date_labels = "%b %d") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Cumulative registrations") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

p1 / p2
```

## Country map

```{r}
#| label: fig-map
#| fig-cap: "Registrations by country"
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 6
#| echo: false
#| 
country_counts <- df |>
  mutate(
    country_raw = str_trim(in_which_country_or_region_are_you_based),
    country_first = str_split(country_raw, "\\s+|,|;") |> map_chr(~ .x[1]),
    iso3 = countrycode(country_first, origin = "country.name",
                       destination = "iso3c", warn = FALSE)
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(iso3)) |>
  count(iso3, name = "registrations")

world <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")

world |>
  left_join(country_counts, join_by(adm0_a3 == iso3)) |>
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = registrations), color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", na.value = "grey90", name = "Registrations") +
  labs(
    title = "WOAH Datathon Registrations by Country",
    caption = "Note: only first country used for multi-country entries"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank())
```

## Participant profiles

```{r}
#| label: fig-profiles
#| fig-cap: "Top  self-descriptions"
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 5
#| echo: false
df |>
  select(how_would_you_describe_yourself_multiple_answers_welcome) |>
  rename(response = how_would_you_describe_yourself_multiple_answers_welcome) |>
  mutate(response = str_split(response, ";")) |>
  unnest(response) |>
  mutate(response = str_trim(response)) |>
  filter(response != "", !is.na(response)) |>
  count(response, sort = TRUE) |>
  slice_head(n = 8) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = n, y = reorder(response, n))) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), hjust = -0.2, size = 3.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(
    title = "How participants describe themselves",
    subtitle = "Top categories · Multiple answers allowed",
    x = "Count", y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```
